name: Figs with Young Pecorino and Honey

ingredients.original: 1 oz / 30 g preserved lemon, finely chopped

ingredients.amount: scant 1 cup / 200 ml Green tahini sauce
ingredients.item: scant 1 cup / 200 ml Green tahini sauce
ingredients.original: scant 1 cup / 200 ml Green tahini sauce

ingredients.amount: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.item: salt and freshly ground black pepper
ingredients.original: salt and freshly ground black pepper

method: Place the fava beans in a pan of boiling water and simmer for 1 to 2 minutes, depending on size. Drain through a large colander and rinse in plenty of cold water to refresh them. Remove the beans from their skins by gently squeezing each one with your fingertips.
Cut the radishes into 6 wedges each and mix with the fava beans, onion, cilantro, preserved lemon, lemon juice, parsley, olive oil, and cumin. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
To serve, pile a mound of salad in one corner of each serving plate, pour the tahini sauce into a small bowl, and stand it next to the salad. Set a pita bread next to them.
